summary: Iteration 14: Testing complete for User Edit Dialog, Profile Page Dataset Fields, and Student ID Removal. FIXED: Backend PUT /api/users/{user_id} permission bug - super_admin role was not being checked. All 9 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend features verified via Playwright.

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: Permission check only validated 'admin' role, not 'super_admin'. Fixed by adding 'super_admin' to is_admin check.

critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/users/{user_id} now correctly allows both 'admin' and 'super_admin' roles to edit any user

UserUpdate model includes all expanded fields: full_name, surname, email, bio, phone, id_number, gender, race, age, personnel_number, division, department, position, level, start_date, years_of_service, ofo_major_group, ofo_sub_major_group, ofo_occupation, ofo_code
Edit dialog has proper 3-section layout: Personal Information, Employment Information, OFO Classification
All 20 edit fields have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing
Profile page correctly shows dataset fields in read-only sections when populated
Student ID field removed from frontend profile page (still exists in backend model as deprecated)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Tebogo Joseph Leshope (manager) for edit testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Users page Edit dialog fully functional with all 20 fields across 3 sections. View Details dialog shows all dataset fields. Profile page has 5 working tabs (Profile Info, My Applications, Security, Documents, Account Info). Student ID removed from UI. Jane Smith (super_admin) has limited dataset fields. Tebogo Joseph Leshope has full HR data including OFO codes.

1_Users_Page_Edit_Dialog_Fields.details: 20/20 fields found with data-testid: edit-full-name, edit-surname, edit-email, edit-phone, edit-id-number, edit-gender, edit-race, edit-age, edit-personnel-number, edit-division, edit-department, edit-position, edit-level, edit-start-date, edit-years-of-service, edit-role, edit-ofo-major, edit-ofo-sub-major, edit-ofo-occupation, edit-ofo-code

2_Admin_Edit_Save.details: Changed Tebogo's Level to D5, received success toast 'User updated successfully', verified value persisted in View Details dialog

3_User_Profile_Dataset_Fields.details: Profile Info tab shows Employment Information section (Division, Department, Position) when populated from HR records

4_Student_ID_Removed.details: Student ID text not found anywhere on /profile page including Account Info tab

5_Profile_Page_All_Tabs.details: All 5 tabs working: Profile Info, My Applications, Security, Documents, Account Info

6_Backend_User_Update_API.details: PUT /api/users/{user_id} returns 200 with expanded fields payload. 9 pytest tests covering GET users, update level, update expanded fields, update OFO fields, update email field

7_View_User_Details.details: View Details dialog for Tebogo shows all 4 sections: Personal Information (Full Name, Surname, ID Number, Gender, Race, Age), Employment Information (Personnel Number, Division, Department, Position, Level, Start Date, Years of Service), OFO Classification (Major Group, Sub Major Group, Occupation, OFO Code), System Information (Role, Status)

bug_fixed.description: PUT /api/users/{user_id} returned 403 'Access denied' when super_admin tried to update other users
bug_fixed.root_cause: Line 1600 in server.py only checked for 'admin' in roles, not 'super_admin'
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed to: is_admin = 'admin' in current_user.get('roles', []) or 'super_admin' in current_user.get('roles', []); if user_id != current_user['id'] and not is_admin: raise HTTPException(403)
bug_fixed.verification: All 9 backend tests now pass, including user update operations by super_admin
